extDescription.message: QoL extras for Edupage - themes, global grade tools, and update reminders.

shortcutUnavailable.message: Shortcut status unavailable in this browser.

menuUpdateHint.message: Pull the latest project from GitHub.

menuUpdateNotice.message: Downloaded version: $local$. Latest GitHub version: $latest$. Pull the latest project from GitHub.

themesDesc.message: Apply Edupage Extras colors across Edupage and the extension menus.

themeHotkeyDesc.message: Optional. Add a Chrome extension shortcut for toggling themes on or off.

themeDesc.message: Choose the colors Edupage Extras applies to Edupage.

themeDisclaimerText.message: Avoid using color themes during tests or exams. The changed colors can stand out. Either disable the theme or use the default one.

customThemeDesc.message: Build your own Edupage Extras colors.

customThemePlaceholder.message: Paste a shared Edupage Extras custom theme here.

customThemeReadyToCopy.message: Custom theme is ready to copy.

centeredLayoutDesc.message: Keep the top schedule and main content aligned in the middle.

hideHelpTextDesc.message: Hide the top-right Edupage help greeting.

timetableHighlightsDesc.message: Color-code substitutions (orange) and classroom changes (blue) on the main page schedule widget.

timetableHighlightsHiddenTabText.message: This feature reads the substitution page through a hidden EduPage tab — a new background tab briefly opens once per day and closes itself as soon as the data is captured. The feature is still a work in progress, so a few changes may be classified imperfectly.

gradeBadgesDesc.message: Show average badges, bars, and the overall average row on the grades page.

subjectAttendanceDesc.message: Inject per-subject absence percentage and total lesson hours into each row on the Grades page, using official EduPage data.

subjectAttendanceHiddenTabText.message: This feature also relies on a hidden EduPage tab to read your timetable — a new background tab briefly opens, captures the data, then closes itself. It only runs when the cache needs a refresh.

accuratePredictedDesc.message: Sample additional weeks of your timetable through extra hidden EduPage tabs so the predicted remaining lessons reflect upcoming substitutions, room changes, and cancellations instead of a flat template. Noticeably slower to load and opens more background tabs.

attendancePercentagesDesc.message: Add the current-halfyear absence percentage into EduPage's own Attendance summary table (the standalone attendance page, not the Grades page).

secondHalfStartDesc.message: Override when the second halfyear begins for attendance calculations. Leave this empty to use EduPage's default date for the current school year.

secondHalfEndDesc.message: Override when the second halfyear ends for predicted attendance in grades. Leave this empty to use EduPage's default end date for the current school year.

gcSyncDesc.message: Sync your EduPage timetable into a dedicated Google Calendar and keep the current week updated when rooms, teachers, or lessons change. This feature is still a work in progress — expect rough edges around halfyear sync and event colors.

gcOauthRequiredText.message: Google Calendar writes do not work with a simple API key. Use a Google OAuth Client ID and Client Secret here instead. For a hobby setup, a free personal Google account and a free Google Cloud project are enough. You do not need Chrome Web Store publishing for the current setup.

gcSetupDesc.message: Create a Google Cloud OAuth Client ID, not an API key. You only need to do this once.

gcStep1.message: 1. Open Google Cloud Console and create or select a project.

gcStep2.message: 2. Enable the Google Calendar API for that project.

gcStep4.message: 4. Create an OAuth client ID of type Web application.

gcStep5.message: 5. Add the exact redirect URI shown below to Authorized redirect URIs.

gcStep6.message: 6. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret, paste them below, then click Connect Google.

gcStep7.message: 7. No payment is required for normal hobby use.

gcCredentialsDesc.message: Paste your Google OAuth Client ID and Client Secret here. API keys are not supported for calendar writes.

gcClearConfirm.message: Remove all EduPage Extras events from the selected Google calendar?

gcHelpRedirect.message: Put that redirect URI into your Google OAuth client exactly as shown. If Google says redirect_uri_mismatch, this field is the fix.

gcHelpModes.message: Week mode syncs the current whole week. On Saturday and Sunday it syncs the upcoming week instead. Halfyear mode repeats the detected timetable template through the current halfyear and then keeps the active week updated from EduPage.

gcHelpSchoolEvents.message: School events are currently conservative: only explicitly marked tests and exams are added when that toggle is enabled.

gcHelpCoverage.message: Halfyear coverage defaults to future events only. Whole current halfyear is available too, but it is slower and may take noticeably longer to finish.

gcHelpEndDate.message: The second halfyear ends on June 30, so this sync will not continue into July or August.

gcHelpThrottle.message: Halfyear sync is intentionally throttled so Google is less likely to reject the extension with rate limits.

gcNeedClientId.message: Paste a Google OAuth Client ID first.

gcNeedClientSecret.message: Paste a Google OAuth Client Secret first.

gcRangeFutureLabel.message: Range: current halfyear from today forward.

gcRangeWeekLabel.message: Range: current week, or upcoming week on weekends.

gradesDebugDesc.message: Print detailed fetch, parsing, matching, and rendering diagnostics for the grades attendance feature into the browser console.

reportProblemDesc.message: If a feature misbehaves on your school's EduPage, generate a diagnostic report so the issue can be fixed without access to your account. Open the affected EduPage page in another tab first, then generate the report.

reportRedactNote.message: When enabled, the report includes page structure (tags, classes, layout) but no grades, names, marks, or other text values.

reportReady.message: Report ready. Review it, then copy, download, or open an issue.

reportNoTab.message: Report ready, but no EduPage tab was found — open the affected page in another tab and regenerate for page details.

reportEmpty.message: Report ready, but no recognizable EduPage content was captured — open the page that is actually broken (grades, timetable, attendance) and regenerate.

reportCopyManual.message: Could not copy automatically — the report is selected, press Ctrl/Cmd+C.

reportIssueOpened.message: Opened a new GitHub issue — attach the downloaded report or paste it in.

updateRemindersDesc.message: Check the public GitHub project for a newer unpacked version.

noUpdateCheck.message: No update check has run yet.

updateReloadReminder.message: After pulling the latest project, also reload the unpacked extension in chrome://extensions/.

updateAvailableStatus.message: Downloaded version: $local$. Latest GitHub version: $latest$. Pull the latest project from GitHub.$reload$ Checked $time$.

updateUpToDateStatus.message: Downloaded version: $local$. Latest GitHub version: $latest$. Checked $time$.

experimentalSubtitle.message: Test activity and visibility protections on Edupage pages.

samDesc.message: Controls how Edupage sees tab activity, focus, mouse movement, and clipboard actions. Changes apply live, but reloading open Edupage tabs gives the cleanest start.

samMasterDesc.message: Turn the full Stay Active feature set on or off at once for Edupage pages.

samHotkeyDesc.message: Optional. No default hotkey is assigned. Use Chrome's extension shortcuts page if you want a shortcut for toggling Stay Active Mode.

keepVisibleDesc.message: Make Edupage read the tab as visible even after switching away.

toggleKeepNotHidden.message: Toggle keep tab marked not hidden

hideTabSwitchDesc.message: Stop Edupage scripts from receiving visibility and page-hide events.

keepFocusedDesc.message: Make Edupage read the page as focused and hide focus-in events.

hideFocusLossDesc.message: Stop Edupage scripts from receiving blur and focus-out events.

hideCursorLeaveDesc.message: Stop Edupage scripts from seeing mouse enter and leave events.

toggleHideCursorLeave.message: Toggle hide cursor leaving the page

hideCursorMoveDesc.message: Stop Edupage scripts from seeing mouse over and out events.

toggleHideCursorMove.message: Toggle hide cursor moving between areas

hidePointerCaptureDesc.message: Stop Edupage scripts from seeing pointer capture and release events.

hideClipboard.message: Hide Copy, Paste, Selection, And Dragging

hideClipboardDesc.message: Stop Edupage scripts from seeing clipboard, context menu, selection, drag, and drop events.

toggleHideClipboard.message: Toggle hide copy paste selection and dragging

stopRedirectsDesc.message: Try to block reload redirects that start after Edupage becomes hidden.

keepAnimation.message: Keep Page Animation Running In Background

keepAnimationDesc.message: Keep requestAnimationFrame callbacks moving while the tab is hidden.

toggleKeepAnimation.message: Toggle keep page animation running in background

showStatusDotDesc.message: Show a small dot so users can see whether Stay Active Mode is active or paused.

showConsoleDebugDesc.message: Print technical diagnostics in the page console when something cannot be changed.

maintenanceDesc.message: Reset restores the experimental defaults and keeps Stay Active Mode turned off.
